titleStmt.title: SII 6.571: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 571. (A.R. No. 135 of 1899). ON A SLAB IN A FIELD AT UCHCHANGIDROOG, HARPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbha
paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka sa
dēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi prava
modalā
cauḷu
da¨rppaṇarāma bhīma
rājavidyā
naṁdana śrī jayasiṁghadēvaru
ti¨rddisi ya nelebīḍinoḷu
rājyaṁgeyuttamire sakava¨rṣa 992 neya sādhāraṇa saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa su
ddhapāḍiva daṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīmāḷappayyaṁgaḷu mahāsandhivigrahi daṇḍanāyaka
māre tarasa¨rgge binnapaṁggeydu baḻage
ccaṁgiya pa¨rvvatakke nālku nāma kṛtayugadalli mēghanādaneṁba rākṣasana māṁsami¨rppudaṟiṁ mēghanā
dameṁtippu trēteyoḷu hiraṇyana nivāsamāgi yoḷu suva¨rṇna
vriṣṭi du paḍedaṁ kanakagiriyeṁba yuttuṁga mahāgiriyāśramaṁ mattuṁ kāraṇadiṁ ca
tu baṁdu kaliyugadaṁduccaṁgiyabbe yeṁbaḷmodalāgi mū¨rdhanyabrāhmaṇakanyaki ku rā
śvaravaraprasādadiṁ dēvatvamaṁ paḍeda¨rggaṁ . [vṛttaṁ .] [U]cceṁgipa¨rvvatameṁbu mēle parasurāmaraṁ
pratiṣṭe gibīḻguṁ ttējō ¨rṇaraṁpaḍedaṁ śrīmaccāḷukyaku
ḻatiḻaka tailapacakrava¨rttiya vīṭigaḷa trailōkyaveṁbuva sthānādhipati śrīmatsanmaṁtrīṁdra O
voṟaḻala nannēśvaradācā¨ryya¨rkkāḷāmukha tapōdhana sakaḻakaḷārakṣāpravīṇa¨rssamastaguṇagaṇā
ḻaṁkṛtasarīrarātrēyagōtrapavitra¨rccatu¨rddasapramāṇasiddhāntabyākhyāta¨rttā¨rkkika
cakrava¨rtti śrīmatkaṁṭeya vakhkhāṇidēvaru Avara śiṣyaru . svasti yamaniyamasvā
dhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiṣaḍaṁgōpahārādisaṁpanna¨rssakaḻa
śāstrapārāvārapāraga¨rssarasvatīka¨rṇāvataṁsarātrēyagōtrapavitra¨rgguruku
ḻasamuddhāraṇa¨rśśivapādapaṁkajabhramaranāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrī
maduccaṁgiyakōṭeya sōmēśvarapaṇḍitara kālaṁkka¨rcci ddhārāpū¨rbbakaṁ māḍi gṛhapra
vēsada dānakāladaluccaṁgiyakōṭiya mēgaṇa tailēśvaradēvara bhōgakkaṁ gaṁṭiganakeṟe
yaṁ śrīmattraillōkyamalla noḻaṁbapallava pe¨rmāḍi jayasiṁghadēvaru biṭu koṭṭaru .
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabdaṁ mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍada(ṁ)ṇḍanāyakaṁ
Āsthānavastunāyakaṁ . sakaḻavidvajjanāmṛtā¨rṇnavapū¨rṇacandrasūnṛtahariścandraṁ
caturacatu¨rmukhaṁ parāṁganāparāṅmukhaṁ vinayavibhūṣaṇaṁ parivāraparitōṣaṇaṁ
paramaṇḍaḻakhāṇḍavapāṇḍunandanaṁ . vibhavasaṁkrandanaṁ baṁdhujanacintāmaṇi . daṇḍanāyakasi
khāmaṇi . bhāṣācatu¨rbhujaṁ . sujanamakharadhvajaṁ . kāntākauntēyaṁ . patihitavainatēyaṁ . paraca
kravakraṁ śiṁghanacakraṁ nāmādiprasastisahitaṁ śrīmaddaṇḍanāyaka dāmapayaṁ Ucaṁgimūva
ttumanāluttamiḻdu gaṁṭiganakeṟeyuma voḷagaṇa gaddeyuṁ modali¨rppattāṟu matta¨rbbeddalēḻuṁ biṭṭu koṭṭar svasti samastagu
ṇasaṁpanna ¨rnnuḍidumattenna ruttuṁgagirirakṣapāḻaka ¨rppatikā¨ryyasādhaka rēkāṁgavīra ¨rmmaṟevogekāva ¨rpparaba
ḷatimiramā¨rttaṇḍa ¨rkkadanakōḻaṇḍa(ṁ)¨rbbhayalōbhava¨rjjita¨rvvikramōpā¨rjjitamahāhavabhairava ¨rttappe
ttappuva [¨r*]vvīravairivāraṇakaṇṭhīrava re¨rtthijanakkīva¨rśśivacaraṇakamaḻaṣaṭcaraṇa¨rttatsamayasamuddharaṇa ¨rnnā
mādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmadekkaṭigaraṟuvadiṁbaruṁ . nagaramumarasumīdha¨rmmamaṁ pratipā
ṭepudu . Ī dha¨rmmamaṁ pratipāḻiśidaṁge vāraṇāśigurukṣētrama¨rkkatī¨rttaṁ prayāgeyōḷ
sahaśraḷiṁgamaṁ pratiṣṭhegeydu rājaśūyamagniṣṭhōmaṁ satakratvasvamēdhamaṁ gaiyda phalama
kumidanaḷidaṁge Initu tī¨rttagaḷoḷu sahaśraliṁgamumaṁ sahaśratapōdhanarumaṁ sahaśra
brāhmaṇarumaṁ sahaśrakavileyumannaḷida mahāpātakaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harētu vasuṁddharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi variṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi [.] dēvadvijagatāṁ bhūmiṁ
pū¨rvvabhuktāṁ harētu yaḥ sa pacyatē mahāghōrē yāvaccaṁdrā¨rkkatārakaṁ . vasudhā ba
hubhi¨rbhuktā rājabhiḥ śakarādibhiḥ [.] yasya yasya yathā bhūmi tasya tasya tathā
phalaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmmasētu[¨r*]nnṛpāṇāṁ kālēkālē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhissa¨rvānnētāṁ bhā
ginaḥ pā¨rttivēndrō bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . madvaṁśajā paramahīpati
vaṁśajā vā pāpādapētamanasā bhuvi bhāvibhūpā . yē pāḷayanti mama dha¨rmmamidaṁ sama
staṁ tēṣāṁ mayā viracitāṁjaḷikēṣu mū¨rdhni . śrīmatsōmēśvarapaṁḍita¨rmmuḷu
gallōjaṁge biṭṭa pūsipuṟiya beyakaṭṭadoḷu siṁkammagaḻdeyumaṁ neraḍu
mattaru beddalumaṁ biṭṭukoṭṭaru . matta ¨rmakkōṭeyu marasu
ḷedakhaṁḍu Uccaṁgimuvattaṟa kaldaṭinivēsana koṭṭiru . Īdanaḷida(ṁ)vaṁ vāṇarāsiya
lu kavileyanaḷidaṁ . mattamikkaḷaseda muvaUpādhyāye[¨rgge] Arasanakeṟeyo
ta gaṟdeyumaṁ [A]ydumattabeddaleyumaṁ śrīmatsōmēśvarapaṇḍitaThe rest of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 6.571 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
